headline: 2 Profitable Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

raw.headline: 2 Profitable Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 That Underwhelm
raw.summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: PTC INC (NASDAQ:PTC) Qualifies as an Affordable Growth Stock Under GARP Screening
summary: PTC Inc. combines strong growth (79.67% EPS surge) with a reasonable P/E of 14.28, offering a GARP investment profile. With excellent profitability and health ratings, it avoids the extremes of growth and value investing.
